name: contains_implies_positive_count
code:
proof fn phi_5_contains_implies_positive_count(m: Multiset<int>, v: int)
    requires
        m.contains(v),
    ensures
        m.count(v) >= 1,
{
}
reason: contains and count must agree — if contains is axiomatized independently of count, a multiset could "contain" an element with zero count, breaking the len_is_zero axiom's foundation
